one_time_description: Debt forgiveness from negotiated settlements under Management Action Plan approved by Indigenous and Northern Affairs Canada
economic_notes: First Nation holds 51% share in a joint venture related to various construction projects. Large Manitoba School Initiative construction project ongoing. New school, wastewater treatment plant, teacherages, and landfill rehabilitation all under construction.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated March 9, 2023 — over two years late. Eight entities consolidated including health authority, employment & training, development corporations, store, bulk fuel, and radio station. Very large construction in progress balance of $73.2M (mainly Manitoba School Initiative at $60.5M). Annual surplus of $21.7M driven partly by Community Services segment surplus of $8.5M from large ISC infrastructure funding recognized. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Province identified as Manitoba based on auditor location and program references.
